---
title: "Math Academy Mathematical Foundations 1"
description: "My notes [Math Academy Mathematical Foundations 1](https://www.mathacademy.com/courses/mathematical-foundations-i)"
author: "Tyler Hillery"
date: "2026-04-05"
filters:
    - social-share
share:
    permalink: "https://tylerhillery.com/notes/math-academy-foundations-1"
    description:
    twitter: true
    facebook: false
    reddit: true
    stumble: false
    tumblr: false
    linkedin: true
    email: true
    mastodon: true
categories: [Courses, In Progress]
---

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Links
- [Hand Written Notes](https://1drv.ms/p/c/b108287c54af8760/IQAg2mVcOfnuTbeJqLGmofr9AehnUEir94AWCLXhhCS1r-A?e=sRQ6PU)

# Notes
